summary: Composer (SpatialBOQCanvas) 9 UX Improvements - Frontend Testing Complete. All 9 UX features verified working: 1) Collapsible side panels, 2) Editable wall dimensions, 3) Door/window placement, 4) 2D elevation view, 5) Keyboard navigation, 6) Live pricing header, 7) Movement hint, 8) Carcass material selection, 9) Direct dimension inputs.
passed_tests: Composer page renders at /projects/{project_id}/spatial-boq route
Left panel with module library is collapsible (click toggle button)
Right properties panel is collapsible
Wall tool allows drawing walls on canvas with dimension labels
Wall dimensions are editable in properties when wall is selected (Length input)
Door tool adds doors near walls (brown rectangle labeled 'Door')
Window tool adds windows near walls (cyan rectangle labeled 'Win')
Module placement by selecting module type then clicking canvas
Module selection and drag to move works
Keyboard arrow keys move selected module (ArrowUp/Down/Left/Right)
Delete/Backspace deletes selected item
Properties panel shows dimension inputs for selected module (W, H, D in mm)
Properties panel shows Finish type dropdown
Properties panel shows Shutter type dropdown
Properties panel shows Carcass Material dropdown (BWR Plywood 710, MR Plywood 303, HDHMR, Particle Board, MDF)
Properties panel shows X/Y position inputs
Live pricing summary in header updates when modules added (Modules count, Area sqft, Est. Cost)
Elevation view shows when wall is selected (shows 'No modules on this wall' and wall length)
Room selector dropdown works (Kitchen, Living Room, Bedroom, Wardrobe, TV Unit, Custom)
Save button saves layout with success toast 'Layout saved'
Summary modal opens when clicking Summary button
Summary modal shows Walls count, Modules count, Total Cabinet Length, Material Area, Estimated Cost
Generate BOQ button generates BOQ items with success toast
Movement hint appears when module selected: 'Drag to move • Arrow keys for fine adjustment • Delete to remove'
Module library shows all 10 module types with color indicators and default dimensions
Canvas shows grid pattern for alignment
Toolbar has Select, Wall, Door, Window, Module tools with tooltips
Zoom In/Out buttons work
seed_data_creation: Used existing project 'test for yadhu - Interior Project' (proj_8aeea5f1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Composer (SpatialBOQCanvas) 9 UX improvements fully tested and working. All features verified: collapsible panels, wall drawing with editable dimensions, door/window placement, module placement with drag/keyboard navigation, properties panel with dimension inputs and material selects, live pricing header, elevation view, room selector, save/generate BOQ functionality. Test project: proj_8aeea5f1 (test for yadhu - Interior Project).

1_collapsible_panels.details: Left module library panel and right properties panel both collapse/expand via toggle buttons

2_editable_wall_dimensions.details: Wall properties panel shows Length (mm) input that updates wall on canvas

3_door_window_placement.details: Door tool places brown rectangles labeled 'Door', Window tool places cyan rectangles labeled 'Win'

4_elevation_view.details: When wall selected, properties panel shows 'Elevation View' section with wall length and module info

5_keyboard_navigation.details: Arrow keys move selected module, Delete/Backspace removes selected item

6_live_pricing_header.details: Header shows Modules count, Area (sqft), Est. Cost (₹) that update in real-time

7_movement_hint.details: When module selected, bottom hint shows 'Drag to move • Arrow keys for fine adjustment • Delete to remove'

8_carcass_material_selection.details: Properties panel has Carcass Material dropdown with BWR Plywood 710, MR Plywood 303, HDHMR, Particle Board, MDF

9_direct_dimension_inputs.details: Properties panel shows W (mm), H (mm), D (mm) inputs for module dimensions, plus X/Y position inputs
